protocol.name: MCP Tool Invocation with OAIAF Authorization
protocol.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool invocation integrated with OAIAF authorization, demonstrating how agents authenticate to MCP servers and access protected tools.

entities.name: OAIAF Agent
entities.description: AI agent using OAIAF framework with MCP client

entities.name: MCP Server
entities.description: MCP server providing tools and resources

entities.name: Authorization Server
entities.description: OAuth server issuing tokens for tool access

entities.name: External API
entities.description: External service accessed by MCP tool

phases.name: MCP Initialization
phases.description: Agent connects to MCP server and discovers tools

phases.name: Tool Execution
phases.description: Tool executes and accesses external resources

flows.label:
initialize
{protocolVersion, capabilities}
flows.description: Agent initiates MCP connection with capabilities

flows.label:
tools/list response
[{name: search_code, inputSchema, auth_required: true}]
flows.description: Server returns tool list with auth requirements

flows.label:
POST /token
grant_type=client_credentials
scope=mcp:search_code
flows.description: Agent requests token for specific MCP tool scope

security.description: Token scoped to specific MCP tools

flows.description: Agent invokes tool with authorization header

flows.label:
Validate Token
Check scope: mcp:search_code
flows.description: MCP server validates token has required scope

flows.label:
GET /api/search
?q=sql+injection
flows.description: Tool makes request to external API

annotations.text: Tool may use its own credentials for external API

flows.label:
tools/call response
{content: [{type: text, text: "Found 3 matches..."}]}
flows.description: MCP server returns formatted tool result
